trades.reasoning: RSI overbought at 84.1 with gain at ~11% approaching the +12% auto-sell target — rotating proceeds into fresher score-95 momentum setups before a potential reversal
Score 95 with RSI 69 in the ideal bullish zone (not overbought), MACD histogram rising, and price 7.7% above SMA-20 — strongest risk/reward on the board
Score 95 with RSI 69.6, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — solid electronics manufacturing play with clean technicals

decisions.briefing: Market is neutral today with the S&P 500 up a modest 0.4% and NASDAQ essentially flat — not a risk-off environment but no strong tailwind either. GOOGL has climbed to nearly +11% gain with RSI at a very overbought 84.1, so we're selling all 6 shares to lock in profits and rotating into three score-95 names (XMTR, TTMI, WULF) whose RSI sits in the 64–70 sweet spot — bullish momentum without being stretched.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities closed mixed on April 30 with the S&P 500 up 0.4% and NASDAQ barely positive at +0.1%, as investors weighed solid Q1 earnings season results against lingering uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate guidance and trade policy headwinds. Mega-cap tech names including Meta (RSI 19) and Microsoft (RSI 23) showed unusually weak momentum, suggesting institutional money is rotating out of the largest growth names and into mid-cap industrials, specialty tech, and infrastructure plays. This divergence — index flat but selective mid-caps surging — is a hallmark of a late-cycle consolidation where stock picking matters more than broad index exposure.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市4月30日收盤表現分歧，標普500指數微漲0.4%，納斯達克指數僅勉強收紅升0.1%。在企業第一季財報季整體表現穩健的同時，市場仍對聯準會利率走向及貿易政策不確定性保持警惕。值得注意的是，Meta（RSI 19）、微軟（RSI 23）等超大型科技股技術面顯著轉弱，顯示機構資金正從大型成長股撤出，轉向中型工業股、特殊科技及基礎設施類股。這種指數橫盤、但精選中型股強勢的分化格局，是景氣循環後段整固期的典型特徵，個股選股能力的重要性因此大幅提升。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Profit rotation is the practice of selling a position that has reached or is near its profit target — locking in gains — and immediately redeploying that capital into fresher opportunities earlier in their uptrend. Rather than riding a stock until it reverses, you capture the gain and put the money back to work where momentum is building, not fading. Today we applied this with GOOGL: nearly +11% gain, RSI overbought, so we sold and rotated into three score-95 stocks with RSI still in the healthy 64–70 range.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 獲利輪動是指在持倉接近或達到獲利目標時主動賣出、鎖定盈利，並立即將資金重新配置至處於上漲週期較早階段、動能更強的新標的。這種策略的核心是「不貪心、讓資金持續做工」——與其死守一檔已過熱的股票等待它反轉，不如提前兌現，把錢投入技術面尚未透支的機會。今日我們對GOOGL便實踐了這一策略：帳面獲利近11%、RSI高達84.1顯示超買，因此賣出並輪動至三檔RSI仍在健康的64–70區間、得分95的強動能股。
